text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 3 day(s) and getting worse, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. Breathing is very laboured.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Just a touch of flu I think — mild fever, a bit of tiredness, dry throat. 8 day(s), though I think I'm slowly getting better.
label: influenza/mild

text: I came down quite suddenly with a high fever, muscle aches all over, and a persistent dry cough. 8 day(s) and barely functioning.
label: influenza/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 1 day(s), and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 3 day(s), and I feel more unwell than yesterday.
label: influenza/moderate

text: Mild fatigue, thought it worth a quick check.
label: non-infectious

text: Just wanted to check in — I've felt slightly off for a few days.
label: non-infectious

text: High fever, bad body aches, shivering, exhausted. Classic flu, but quite rough — 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: influenza/mild

text: Just wanted to check in — I've felt slightly off for a few days.
label: non-infectious

text: I'm mostly fine, just wanted to rule anything out.
label: non-infectious

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 1 day(s), and I can't seem to shake it, which frightens me.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Nothing dramatic, just wanted a routine check.
label: non-infectious

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 4 day(s), and it seems to be escalating. I can't catch my breath.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Nothing specific, just not feeling 100% lately.
label: non-infectious

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 6 day(s) like this, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared. My temperature is really elevated.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 3 day(s) like this, and I'm really worried because it's getting worse. I'm struggling to breathe.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I'm struggling badly to breathe — every breath hurts, coughing up thick dark mucus, high fever. 9 day(s) of this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: It hit me fast — fever, chills, splitting headache, muscle pain everywhere. Been in bed 4 day(s). Breathing is very laboured.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I feel rotten. Sudden high fever, severe body aches, dry hacking cough. 8 day(s) now, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
